creator: peterjeremy@acm.org
text:

Fix: 

A workaround is
	find /usr/local/include/firefox3 -perm 0755 -o -type d -print | xargs chmod 755
How-To-Repeat: 	cd /usr/ports/www/firefox35
	make install
	find /usr/local/include/firefox3 -perm 0755 -o -type d -ls
